Leadership and Women in a Digitalizing World

Our Rector Prof. Dr. Şeyma Aydınoğlu participated as a guest speaker in the panel titled “Leadership and Women in a Digitalizing World” organized in cooperation with Düzce University Women's Studies Application and Research Center and Turkey Leadership Improvement Program (TULIP).

Our university's tennis team has been promoted from the 1st League to the Super League.

Our tennis team, which competed in the 2023-2024 Turkey Unilig Tennis League, became the champion in the tournament in which 24 universities participated and promoted our university tennis team from the 1st League to the Super League.

Çağın MACİT, our student from the Department of Coaching at the Faculty of Sports Sciences

Our student Çağın MACİT, Department of Coaching, Faculty of Sports Sciences, made the presentation of his graduation project titled “The Effect of Sports Virtual Reality on Performance in Wingate Anaerobic Power Test”

More »

Prof. Dr. Şeyma Aydınoğlu has been appointed as the Rector of Istanbul Galata University.

With the decision of the Presidency of the Republic of Turkey dated 24 May 2024 and numbered 2024/147 published in the Official Gazette dated 25 May 2024, Prof. Dr. Şeyma Aydınoğlu was appointed as the Rector of Istanbul Galata University.
